# Pull Request

## Summary
- What does this PR do?
- Why is it needed?

## Changes
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Chore/Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/CD

## Linked Issue(s)
- Closes #

## Screenshots / Loom (if UI)
- Add before/after or a short demo link.

## How to Test
- Steps to run locally
- Any specific env vars or seeds

## Checklist
- [ ] Title uses conventional commits (e.g., feat:, fix:, chore:)
- [ ] Description explains the change and rationale
- [ ] CI passes (type-check, lint, build, tests)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] Updated docs/README/runbook as needed
- [ ] No sensitive keys or credentials committed
- [ ] No breaking changes, or documented in the section below

## Breaking Changes (if any)
- What breaks and migration steps, if applicable

## Security/Privacy Considerations
- Data access, PII, or permissions touched?

## Post-Merge Steps
- Any follow-ups (deploy, create issues, backfill jobs, etc.)
